creator: bhughes@freebsd.org
text:
I am getting this panic on boot on an m4.xlarge EC2 instance running a 12.0-CURRENT snapshot:

panic: Assertion if_getdrvflags(ifp) == i failed at /usr/src/sys/net/iflib.c:2201
cpuid = 3
time = 1516352386
KDB: stack backtrace:
db_trace_self_wrapper() at db_trace_self_wrapper+0x2b/frame 0xfffffe00882cc610
vpanic() at vpanic+0x18d/frame 0xfffffe00882cc670
vpanic() at vpanic/frame 0xfffffe00882cc6f0
iflib_init_locked() at iflib_init_locked+0x770/frame 0xfffffe00882cc750
iflib_if_ioctl() at iflib_if_ioctl+0x744/frame 0xfffffe00882cc7b0
ifioctl() at ifioctl+0x190f/frame 0xfffffe00882cc850
kern_ioctl() at kern_ioctl+0x2b9/frame 0xfffffe00882cc8b0
sys_ioctl() at sys_ioctl+0x15c/frame 0xfffffe00882cc980
amd64_syscall() at amd64_syscall+0x79b/frame 0xfffffe00882ccab0
fast_syscall_common() at fast_syscall_common+0xfc/frame 0x7fffffffe480

The snapshot is using this kernel:

FreeBSD 12.0-CURRENT #0 r328126: Thu Jan 18 15:25:44 UTC 2018
    root@releng3.nyi.freebsd.org:/usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/GENERIC amd64

This seems to be related to the recent changes to make the ixl driver use iflib.
